title: sphaeralcea mendocina
intro: Sphaeralcea mendocina, also known as the pink gilia or pink gilia sphaeralcea, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It belongs to the mallow family and is a perennial herb with bright pink flowers. Sphaeralcea mendocina has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant's health benefits include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves for various health remedies.
